name: copilotprompts-weekly-pacing
title: Weekly Pacing Skill for Cowork
shortDescription: A calm weekly pacing skill that classifies each day as Rest, Light, Focus, or Heavy using Work IQ signals.
longDescription: Weekly Pacing analyzes calendar load, email volume, and semantic themes to visualize the shape of the week and provide one gentle recommendation. Install by placing the weekly-pacing skill folder in Documents/Cowork/skills/ so Cowork can discover it.

references.name: Copilot Cowork Skills Documentation
references.description: Official documentation for Copilot Cowork skills integration.
